title: senecio varvarcensis
intro: Senecio varvarcensis, also known as tansy ragwort, is a perennial herb belonging to the sunflower family, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and bitter, milky sap. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and act as a diuretic. The health benefits of Senecio varvarcensis include reducing inflammation, improving circulation, and supporting the immune system, although its effectiveness for these purposes may vary depending on the individual and preparation method. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity at high doses.
